details: The agent ran cluster commands (triage, pvc view, pod view) and correctly identified the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending/Unschedulable → because PVC 'data-cache' is unbound → because StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is available).
